title: Permanent Baby Villagers - Golden Dandelion
description: Want a better golden dandelion? This mod adds the missing villager golden dandelion feature! Feed the item to kids to lock their age and get permanent baby villagers forever.
body:
# Permanent Baby Villagers

Keep your baby villagers young forever! This lightweight mod adds a simple but highly requested interaction: the ability to freeze a baby villager's aging process completely. It is perfect for map makers, builders, or anyone who wants to keep their villages looking lively with these adorable tiny inhabitants. 👶✨

![The Golden Dandelion Effect](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/JYEuQEuL/images/a323b86a18b429459ef7b24b76152f37c81b386a.gif)

## Features

* **Eternal Youth:** Simply right-click any baby villager with a Golden Dandelion to permanently stop their biological clock.
* **Vanilla Friendly:** The interaction uses the official in-game items, sounds, and particles. The baby will consume the flower and emit happy green sparks to confirm the effect! 🌼
* **Seamless Integration:** Built specifically for the newest game version.

## How to Use

1. Obtain a Golden Dandelion in your world.
2. Find a baby villager.
3. Right-click the baby villager with the flower in your hand.
4. Watch the happy sparks fly! The villager will now stay young forever.
